---
title: My dynamic report
output: html_fragment
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, error=FALSE)

```

```{css}
body {
  background-color: #f4f7f6; 
  font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif;
  color: #2c3e50;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

.main-container {
  max-width: 800px;
  background-color: white;
  margin: 30px auto;
  padding: 40px;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
  border-radius: 10px;
}
```

## Daily Gym Workout Observations

This report analyzes my workout habits, focusing on duration and routine frequency over the past two weeks.

```{r}
library(tidyverse)


url <- "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vTo1apWSkW7AcVlXChJINC05KAK-K3OMCkALDgFjkKa9Yj0HHK_GFsGTdc5YnGPBJbbhoTcQ7A9h4kn/pub?gid=69320201&single=true&output=csv"


logged_data <- read_csv(url)

head(logged_data)



latest_data <- logged_data %>%
  rename(time_stamp = 1,
         routine = 2,
         day_of_week = 3,
         minutes = 4,
         crowding = 5)


names(latest_data)


avg_minutes <- mean(latest_data$minutes, na.rm = TRUE)
print(paste("Average workout time:", round(avg_minutes, 2), "minutes"))


max_minutes <- max(latest_data$minutes, na.rm = TRUE)
print(paste("Max workout time:", max_minutes, "minutes"))


ggplot(latest_data, aes(x = routine)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "steelblue") +
  labs(title = "Frequency of Each Workout Routine",
       subtitle = "Observation over 2 weeks",
       x = "Routine Type",
       y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal()


latest_data$day_of_week <- factor(latest_data$day_of_week, 
                                  levels=c("Monday", "Tuesday", "Wednesday", "Thursday", "Friday", "Saturday", "Sunday"))

latest_data %>%
  group_by(day_of_week) %>%
  summarise(mean_time = mean(minutes)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = day_of_week, y = mean_time)) +
  geom_col(fill = "coral") +
  labs(title = "Average Workout Duration by Day",
       x = "Day of the Week",
       y = "Average Minutes") +
  theme_minimal()
```

Based on my observations, my average workout duration was `r round(avg_minutes, 2)` minutes. 
The longest session I recorded was `r max_minutes` minutes!
